title: salacia cognata var. genuina
intro: Salacia cognata var. genuina, also known as the "Bitter Chai" or "Indian Winter Cherry," is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Salacia cognata var. genuina include reducing blood sugar levels, improving lipid profiles, and preventing cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
